methods.method:
method return array of Object is res : array of Object; cmd : text; begin cmd := "" & " VIA Object_To_Children " & " CLASS bisB_ContractVersion " & " IF "&#34&"COUNT > 0"&#34&" ( " & " SORT (- bisB_CreationDate) PICK 0 1 " & --" VALUE bisB_ContractState = 1 " & " IF "&#34&"COUNT > 0"&#34&" ( " & " SAVEAS start "& #34 &"=YEAR(ATTRIBUTE('bisB_ContractBegin'))" &#34 & --" SAVEAS end "&#34&"=YEAR(ATTRIBUTE('bisB_ContractEnd'))"&#34& " SAVEAS end "&#34&"=YEAR(ATTRIBUTE('bisB_ContractEndCalc'))"&#34& " SAVEAS auto "&#34&"=ATTRIBUTE('bisB_AutomaticRenewal')"&#34& " START VALUE bisB_YearObjectID >= DATAOF start " & -- " IF "&#34&"NOT auto"&#34&" ( " & " VALUE bisB_YearObjectID <= DATAOF end " & -- " )" & " )" & " )" ; res := FilterNavigation(cmd, [self]); return res;
return res; end;

class_methods.method: method is begin QueueAction(self, "SetContactVersion", false); end;
